channel.title: blockchain on Unkle Bonehead
channel.description: Recent content in blockchain on Unkle Bonehead

item.title: What is the form of a perfect internet? S2Ep13
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today’s episode was spurred, as usual, by the Cryptocracy newsletter. One of the stories Allen reported on was about what is the perfect internet? So that’s what Allen & I riffed about.

item.title: Paragraph, Unicorns & AI, OhMy! S2Ep12
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Allen & I talk about the moving of the Cryptocracy newletter to Paragraph from Substack. Why he did it and the multiple benefits for both him and the readers.

item.title: A Whole Lotta News S2Ep09
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: This episode is slightly different than normal. We recorded this live and it worked pretty good.

item.title: Hanging with PVM S2Ep08
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today we got to hang out with PVM. An awesome Web3 personality with NFT’s for charities and written content to an audience in the thousands.

item.title: Web3 Idenitity Crisis Pt3S1Ep07
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: This week we finish our discussion of Web3’s Identity Crisis

item.title: Web3 Identity Crisis: Pt1 S1E05
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: There is so much to unpack in this article that this is going to end up being a series.

item.title: Platform Review: hive S1Ep04
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today we do our first platform review and it is what we consider to be the best Cryptosocial platform currently available.

item.title: Why Cryptosocial Networks are Needed S1Ep02
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In this episode we are going to go over the criteria and expectations that we think should be included in a Cryptosocial media platform. What we think you should look for in a social media home.
